meaning: adj.兰卡斯特王室的,兰开斯特城的n.兰卡斯特王室的,兰开斯特城的,兰开斯特人的
examples: Born in canada to a lancastrian father and a welsh mother-he is also a quarter chinese-hargreaves learned his trade with the calgary foothills in his homeland before being spotted by bayern in1997.
